title: Dynamidium clementei
taxonomy: Dynamidium clementei is a genus of diatoms, which is a type of algae that belongs to the phylum Bacillariophyta. This group is part of the kingdom Chromista, which comprises a diverse range of eukaryotic organisms. Within the phylum Bacillariophyta, Dynamidium clementei falls under the class Bacillariophyceae, which is characterized by the presence of frustules, or cell walls made of silica. The class Bacillariophyceae is further divided into several orders, with Dynamidium clementei being part of the order Bacillariales. The classification of Dynamidium clementei highlights the complexity and diversity of diatom taxonomy.
